docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update the backend build context path to reflect a directory restructure from ./source/backend to ./backend.
docker-compose.yml.why_exists: The build context path ./source/backend/educycle-java no longer exists after the directory restructure, causing the Docker build to fail.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update the frontend build context path to reflect a directory restructure from ./source/frontend to ./frontend.
docker-compose.yml.why_exists: The build context path ./source/frontend no longer exists after the directory restructure, causing the Docker build to fail.
